entry.title: Bill 60 (Hawaiʻi County): Passed Second Reading → —
entry.content:
AMENDS CHAPTER 25, ARTICLE 1, ARTICLE 2, ARTICLE 4, ARTICLE 5, AND ARTICLE 7, OF THE HAWAIʻI COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), RELATING TO ZONING DISTRICT REGULATIONS FOR MEETING FACILITIES, CHURCHES, TEMPLES, SYNAGOGUES, AND COMMUNITY BUILDINGS (Planning

Director Initiated) Removes existing zoning regulations for community buildings, churches, temples, and synagogues and creates new regulations for “meeting facilities” and “special events.”

Status: Passed Second Reading → —

Latest action: On agenda 2025-09-03

View on the council site

entry.title: New: Bill 60 (Hawaiʻi County) — Passed Second Reading
entry.content:
AMENDS CHAPTER 25, ARTICLE 1, ARTICLE 2, ARTICLE 4, ARTICLE 5, AND ARTICLE 7, OF THE HAWAIʻI COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), RELATING TO ZONING DISTRICT REGULATIONS FOR MEETING FACILITIES, CHURCHES, TEMPLES, SYNAGOGUES, AND COMMUNITY BUILDINGS (Planning

Director Initiated) Removes existing zoning regulations for community buildings, churches, temples, and synagogues and creates new regulations for “meeting facilities” and “special events.”

Latest action: Council: Bill 60, Draft 4 passes second & final reading - 9/3/25

View on the council site
